title: Glass Mason Jars with Lids - Set of 6 500ml Air Tight Jars for Overnight Oats, Homemade Jam - Sturdy Glass Jar with Lid for Honey, Pickling, Preserving, Food Storage (500ml)
features: SET OF 6 MASON JARS - Mason jars are an essential home organisation tool and kitchen accessory. It’s always a good idea to stock up with a 6-pack of high quality 500ml jars with lids. Dimensions: 12.5cm (H) x 7cm (W).

AIRTIGHT SEAL - In contrast to other glass storage containers, these food-grade mason jars deliver an airtight and watertight seal. You need a sturdy airtight seal for lasting freshness if you wish to store food or beverages.

REUSABLE PRESERVING JARS - Once you purchase this set of six preserve jars, you won’t have to continuously reinvest as they are reusable. These preserving jars are made of solid, clear glass with durable, silver metal lids.

VERSATILE FOOD STORAGE - These dishwasher safe, 100% BPA-free air tight jars are easy to clean and fantastic for storing food! You can use these glass jars for homemade jams, meal prep, pickles, chutneys and more.

PERFECT FOR HOBBIES - Start a small crafting business or find a new favourite hobby with these premium mason glass jars with lids! They’re perfect for lotions, honey, skincare, candle making and wedding gifts.
description: Product Description Practical Addition to your Household Mason jars are an essential home organisation tool and kitchen accessory. The fact they are reusable and dishwasher safe means you won’t have to continuously reinvest, as these Mason Jars are here to stay! Versatile Jars also Suitable for Cosmetics There are multiple things you can store in this 6 pack of Mason Jars! Not only food, but also lotions, honey, skincare, candle making, wedding gifts, and shower favours. Perfect for Food and Beverages These 100% BPA-free air tight jars are easy to clean and fantastic for storing food! You can use these large glass jars for homemade jams, meal prep, pickles, chutneys, baby food storage and more. HEFTMAN Glass Mason Jars With Lids - 6 Pack Collect, store, and preserve your favourite foods in these classic, reusable mason glass jars. Featuring a durable silver screw top lid with an airtight seal to prevent food spoilage, these jars are ideal for meal prep, pickling, chutneys, and more. These glass jars with lids are also dishwasher safe for easy cleaning.
